title: Brainrot Plague

'''Brainrot Plague''', also known throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as '''Loedorvian Brain Plague''' and '''Brainworm Rot''', was an extremely deadly affliction noted to have been found in [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] and [[Cephalopod/Legends|cephalopods]] with high levels of [[dialogen]] in their [[Blood/Legends|bloodstream]], including [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidians]] (and presumably [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] and other [[Near-Duros]]), [[Anomid/Legends|Anomids]], and [[Wol Cabasshite/Legends|Wol Cabasshites]]. The plague attacked the [[Brain/Legends|brain]] and central [[nervous system]], [[Death/Legends|killing]] its victims in a short period of [[Time/Legends|time]].

Prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] it struck the population of [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] to which the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] did not send aid. It was used as a biological weapon by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the height of the Clone Wars. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] ordered Separatist forces to release the plague on the [[Weemell sector/Legends|Weemell sector]], wiping out the entire Human population, including the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. The [[Sector/Legends|sector]] was rendered uninhabitable in a matter of [[Standard month/Legends|months]].

The plague was found in three different types: [[Brainworm Rot Type A]], [[Brainworm Rot Type B|B]], and [[Brainworm Rot Type C|C]].
